candidate_definitions.text: A Ruby Gem to detect under what license a project is distributed.

FROM ruby:3.4.7@sha256:779ca68b84fe3804e27f5b7ea5ab001005c708b7236a798c15b860d71cba9d21 WORKDIR /usr/src/app RUN git init RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y cmake COPY Gemfile licensee.gemspec ./ COPY lib/licensee/version.rb ./lib/licensee/version.rb RUN bundle install COP…
